# threads

> composable llm workflows for node.js

threads is a library for building composable LLM workflows in node.js.
it provides primitives for managing conversation history, tool execution,
and function composition. supports openai, anthropic, google, and xai models.
includes built-in streaming, tool approval, retry logic, thread persistence,
text embeddings, and image generation.


## Getting Started

- [Home](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/index.md): overview and core principles
- [Quick Start](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/quick-start/index.md): installation and basic usage

## Core Concepts

- [Threads](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/concepts/threads/index.md): thread management and persistence
- [Composition](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/concepts/composition/index.md): composing workflows with compose, model, scope, when, tap, retry
- [Tools](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/concepts/tools/index.md): defining and executing tools
- [Schemas](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/concepts/schemas/index.md): json schema output and validation

## Advanced

- [MCP Integration](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/advanced/mcp/index.md): model context protocol integration
- [Embeddings](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/advanced/embedding/index.md): text embeddings
- [Image Generation](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/advanced/image-generation/index.md): image generation with openai, xai, google
- [Tool Approval](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/advanced/approval/index.md): tool approval system
- [Helpers](https://nvms.github.io/threaded-ai/advanced/helpers/index.md): utility functions
